name: Hawaiian Wedding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Fruit cocktail in syrup (20 oz)
1 can Crushed pineapple in syrup (20 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cake mix according to package instructions and bake on a cookie sheet for 20 minutes until cooled.
2. Combine the pudding, softened cream cheese, and fruit juice from the fruit (syrup) drained in a bowl. Mix well at medium speed.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the cooled cake.
4. Combine the fruit cocktail and pineapple with the remaining fruit juice and spread over the pudding layer.
5. Sprinkle chopped walnuts and coconut flakes on top of the fruit mixture.
6. Top with Cool Whip and add additional sprinkles of coconut and nuts for decoration.
(Note: You can vary the types of fruit and pudding flavors to your liking.)
